feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: cannot add/edit the value in Job Function with "+" sign
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

Here is my reproducing issue: 

1. Go to Manage Data 

2. Select Position, type the position ID 

3. Under Job Info > Job Function, there is a "+" sign displayed here. 

4. Click Take action > Make correction 
5. Check at the Job Function again but the system not allow to add/edit the values

Anybody knows how to remove this "+" sign? How it happen?

entry.title: Pending Workflows for removed Workflow Group Member
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

Has anyone received feedback on pending workflows for users that has been removed from the workflow group they are a member of? This is during the case when a workflow was initiated prior the user being removed from the workflow group due to cases such as moving to a new role, but tile still remains in their home page due to the workflow remaining on pending.

Currently, there is no option as an end user to completely remove or hide it. They will no longer have access to view the workflow, but it will still remain in their homepage as long as it is in pending status.

This can sometimes cause inconvenience to the previous approver who no longer needs the information in their homepage. I have raise an improvement request to either provide admins option to manually remove these workflows from the user's end or add a new check tool validation to remove workflows for invalid approvers as of check tool run date.

Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence

entry.title: Financial Master Data for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Until the 2302 version of S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, we had the scope item 4AJ available called "Financial Master Data for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central". However, this has been deprecated with the release 2308 without a successor scope item. Can someone please explain how to proceed for the integration of financial master data for implementations of newer releases?

Best regards,
Kaiwen

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Triger workflow for time off requests
entry.content:
Hello All.

Maybe someone can help with the next task. 

We have a time type (LOA) - for example, MatLeave.

It needs to configure a workflow with next condition: 

When a user creates this leave for the first time the workflow must inform a specific role (HR). If the user changes Start date or Expected Return Date for this leave (saved before) the workflow must not be triggered. If the user adds to the leave Actual Return Date the workflow must inform a specific role again. 

So, the specific role must be  informed if  the leave is created for the first time and when the leave updates Expected Return Date. 

 

Standart case with workflow on time type in the field Workflow Configuration triggers workflow for any changes. 

I think about object definition of Employee Time. I mean Save Rules. But I cannot find a solution to my case. 

 

Did somebody come across with same requirements? Any recommendation, please. 

Thank you. 

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking HCM Time Management SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Is there an option to default position title from job title field in Create New Position?
entry.content:
Is there an option to default "position title" from "job title" field in Create Same Level Position option through Position Org Chart?

We need to enter the position title manually in the screen so looking for option if the field can be pre-populated with job title value.

entry.title: Hi there, we want to create a business case by adding questions to managers to reply to promo
entry.content:
We aim to create a business case within the Job Info portlet by adding specific questions for managers to answer when submitting promotions. The questions to be included are:

  1. Please provide an overview of the associate's knowledge, skills, and experience as they relate to the new position.
  2. How was the proposed salary determined? (e.g., salary band, market data, internal equity considerations).
  3. Is this position considered a critical role?
  4. Where does this position fit within your succession plan?
  5. What impact will the promotion have on the department and/or similar positions within the department?
  6. Are there any additional Total Rewards changes requested with this promotion? (e.g., time off/vacation, bonus payments, additional compensation, education assistance, etc.).

Although we have already added the questions in the Job Info portlet, we are facing two issues:

  1. We need to create a separate section specifically for these questions.
  2. In the workflow, the questions are not appearing in the correct order, and sometimes not all of them are showing.

We need to ensure the questions are grouped into a separate section within the Job Info portlet and that they appear in the correct order in the workflow.

Please advise.

entry.title: Query: Best Practices for Workflow Email Notifications to Shared Mailbox
entry.content:
Hi,

Our admin team has a requirement that all workflow email notifications, where they are part of the CC role, should be sent to a specific shared mailbox. This mailbox is already available in Active Directory. Currently, we have created a workflow group called 'XYZ' (as an example) and added the admin team members to this group. The group is then assigned the CC role in the workflow, resulting in all four or five members receiving individual emails.

I am considering creating one generic account in EC called 'XYZ,' assigning the shared mailbox email ID (available in Active Directory) to this account, and granting the workflow permission to the 'XYZ' account. However, I am unsure if this approach aligns with best practices or if there are any data privacy or security risks involved. Could you please advise?

entry.title: IAS with 2 source systems: SF for users and Entra for groups - possible ?
entry.content:
Hi partner consultants,

Client is looking at having 2 source systems in IPS. Main purpose is they want Groups to come from Azure/Entra and users to be automatically assigned to the groups in IAS and eventually this groups will be used to assign role collections in BTP. Question is if it is feasible (that you have these 2 sources?)?

- Users will come from SF (Typical SuccessFactors IPS Source to IAS IPS Target)

- Groups will come from Azure/Entra (Azure IPS Source to IAS IPS Target)

Standalone, these two will work but together, little bit skeptical. Is there a KBA that could tell exactly this set-up/combination is not a good idea? Also thinking about shared IAS environments that was common in the past and how they worked but appreciate experience and inputs please.

Thank you so much!

@ChrisPaine

entry.title: RBP config workbook
entry.content:
Hi,

Wanted to check if there's a provided RBP workbook template for implementation documentation?

Pam

entry.title: Event-Event Reasons
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

Once Probation Status is marked as Confirmed, the Employment Type will change to Confirmed, and the column will freeze. No further changes can ever be made to make the employee probationer back.

entry.title: Error when contingent worker is hired as permanent employee (SF-AD integration)
entry.content:
Hello,

We are facing an issue with one of our new hires in the ActiveDirectory-SuccessFactors integration. 

Following message is shown in AD: 

Failure Description

An entry cannot not be provisioned in this target: SuccessFactors. The entry is 12345. The reason the entry cannot be provisioned is internal to that application. An example of why an entry cannot be provisioned is a user with a given public identifier, such as an email address, having previously exercised a regulatory right to be removed from the application.
ReportableIdentifier
emp.emp@company.com

The username of the previous employment was the username AD is trying to update now. emp.emp@company.com

 

The username of the new employment was a number sequence, like 12345. 

 

AD tried to update the new employment with the old username which was not possible since the old username was taken. 

 

From past experience, I have seen that the old username is automatically updated to username_INACT. Why does this not happen in this case? 

 

Hope someone knows the answer to this. I thought that was standard behavior. 

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Cross entity business rule to make sure job and comp effective dates are the same
entry.content:
Hi,

Has anyone set up business rules to ensure that the dates in the Job Info and Comp Info portlets are the same? This is a requirement from one of my clients, and I would like to hear about your experience and how this was achieved before we proceed.

Appreciate all feedback

Br,

Ines

entry.title: How can i see all employees while navigating in SuccessFactors employee central ?
entry.content:
I am currently struggling to consult an overview of all current employees withing a certain company. 

I do not want to create a report, i want to consult as an HR admin all employees under my company. 

And then select an employee from that list to update some information. 

 

It can not be that i have to know the name per person or the personID of an employee in order to be able to change certain information? Or that i have to work employee by employee.

entry.title: Which tools do you use for CSV files?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I currently have more to do with SuccessFactors HCM than I would like.
Anyway, I have noticed that you have to deal with a lot of CSV files and the separators and date / time formatting is very limited.

So a CSV file from SuccessFactors HCM always uses a comma, if another separator is possible, then this is very rare.
The other is the date / time, here the system is a little more flexible but there are also components that only know MM/DD/YYYY.

Well I work in Europe and the date format MM/DD/YYYYY and the comma separator isn't common for people and MS tools here.
So MS Excel can't be used.

So I wanted to ask around, which tools do you use to edit and view these CSV files?
I explicitly do not want to use MS Excel, as this type of CSV file cannot be handled without technical knowledge

Thanks for your input 😄

Greetings
Andy

entry.title: Storing 10 Years of Compensation Statements in Employee Profile
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I have a customer requirement to store up to 10 years of Compensation Statements in the Employee Profile. The goal is to ensure these documents remain accessible for a decade, linked directly within each employee's profile.

I would like to know if anyone is aware of any limitations or best practices related to this. Specifically:

  1. Are there any system limitations in terms of storing and retrieving up to 10 compensation statements per employee over this period?
  2. Could having up to 10 compensation statements in the profile lead to performance issues, especially in terms of loading times or system responsiveness?
  3. Are there any recommendations on how to efficiently manage and store such a large amount of compensation data without impacting system performance?

Any insights or experiences on this would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Creation of image based dynamic signiture on Document Generation (As RCM Offer Letter)
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Is it possible to create dynamic image based signiture in document templates. According to a KBA In RCM offer letters, it can be done via raise a incident to SAP.

Can we do the same thing in EC document generation.

entry.title: Restrict User to make changes to Payroll Area effective start date of next Pay Period
entry.content:
We have to create a business rule under Compensation Information, so that changes made to Payroll Area are effective Begin date of next Pay Period.

In order to achieve that we have created a Variable to Get Start Date of Next Pay Period(). And under If Expression applied a condition that "

If

Compensation Information Model.Payroll Area.Value is not equal to Compensation Information Model.Payroll Area.Previous value 

And

Compensation Information Model.Event Date. Value is not equal to Variable (var_Begin date of Next pay Period))

Then

Raise "Error Message"

But, we are not able to get Start Date of Next pay Period with the help of this variable. May I know if any one has applied a business rule to achieve this. Thanks!

entry.title: Default pay components for white collar
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a scenario as below

pay scale structure objects (pstype, area, group, level) are enabled recently. Compensation structure is a new MDF object enabled as well.

compensation structure has been defined with relevant pay components under each. many such compensation structures are created and pay components differ for each category. This set up has been done for each countries - Belgium, Finland, Sweden, Norway. one such example as shown below

while trying to make adjustments on existing employee (via change job and comp info) with the combination selected as white collar (from PS objects) along with relevant compensation structure entry as selected, expectation at compensation information portlet is that I am able to see pay components which are configured as per the compensation structure object. This is working fine.

how ever the same behavior is not seen for a new hire, meaning all pay components are appearing instead of only pay components as per compensation structure object.

there are no business rules which are currently controlling it. Is there a way to achieve it?

entry.title: Mapping "Total Team Size" Field from Employee Profile to Background Elements
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently working on a scenario where we need to include the Total Team Size field in the Background Elements, as it directly influences the bonus plan for employees. The Total Team Size is a field present in the Employee Profile, and we would like to know if it is possible to map this field to the Background Elements, as it appears in the dropdown list when mapping fields.

However, when attempting to map the field, I encounter the following error:

Has anyone encountered this issue or knows if there are any specific configurations needed to successfully map this field? Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,

entry.title: Service Consumption Model for SuccessFactors Compound Employee API (SOAP) - Invalid SessionID
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am consuming SuccessFactors' Compound Employee API (SOAP) using the Service Consumption Model (Web Service) in ABAP Cloud. The methods (Login, Query, Logout, etc.) were generated from the SOAP WSDL file.

While the Login method successfully provides the SessionID in the response, I encounter an error, "Invalid SessionID", when calling the Query method.

In CPI, this is managed internally by the SuccessFactors adapter, and in SOAP UI, it is handled using the 'Maintain HTTP session' option. However, I am unsure how to implement similar behavior in ABAP Cloud to ensure the session is maintained across calls.

I would appreciate any guidance or suggestions on handling the session effectively.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,
Mohit
